name: signoz
description: Official SigNoz plugin for MCP setup, docs, queries, dashboards, and alerts

interface.shortDescription: Official SigNoz MCP setup and skills for docs, queries, dashboards, and alerts
interface.longDescription: Installs the official SigNoz skills and a bundled MCP server registration for Codex. Use signoz-mcp-setup to configure a SigNoz Cloud region, hosted MCP URL, or self-hosted HTTP endpoint before running docs, query, dashboard, alert, and view workflows.
defaultPrompt: Set up SigNoz MCP for my SigNoz Cloud region.
Investigate checkout errors across logs, traces, and metrics.
Create a checkout dashboard and 5xx alert.
